reasoning: The control requires cryptographic mechanisms to protect data in transit. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that TLS is enabled for Ingress resources to secure external traffic, using mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes for internal service-to-service communication, ensuring the API server uses TLS to secure communication with clients, and enabling TLS for etcd to secure data between etcd nodes and clients.
title: 3_13_8: 3.13.8 Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards
